summary: Regression frontend testing after ProjectDetail refactor into tab components + Context. Logged in as superadmin, opened 'DB Test' project. All 7 tabs render and switch correctly; all requested data-testids are present and functional; header + meta strip + 5 stat cards render visually. Read-only actions (Check for Updates, Scan Required Vars) execute without errors. edit-config-btn on Overview correctly switches to Configuration tab. Refactor appears behavior-preserving.

console_warnings.warning: `value` prop on `input` should not be null. Consider using an empty string to clear the component or `undefined` for uncontrolled components.
console_warnings.note: React controlled-input warning — some input receives null (possibly a config field before data loads or an optional field like github_token/domain). Pre-existing likely; not a regression blocker but should be fixed by defaulting values to empty string in ConfigTab/EnvironmentTab.

tab-config.notes: cfg-ssl-mode is a shadcn Select (BUTTON element) - not clicked to avoid mutating; conditional field visibility not visually verified but component structure intact

tab-environment.notes: cfg-env textarea empty for DB Test project (expected — no env vars set yet)

header_verification: Visually confirmed via screenshot: name 'DB Test', badges (NOT DEPLOYED, HTTP, STAGING, No domain), meta strip (Branch=main, Domain=—, Ports=—/—, Database=dbtest_db), and 5 stat cards (Status=Created, Deployment=Not Started, Uptime=—, Last Deploy=Never, Environment=Staging) all render correctly.
action_items: OPTIONAL LOW: Ensure all controlled inputs default to '' instead of null (likely in ConfigTab fields such as github_token/domain, or a numeric port field) to eliminate the React 'value prop should not be null' warning.
critical_code_review_comments: Refactor of ProjectDetail into per-tab components + ProjectDetailContext appears successful — no behavior changes observed and all data-testids preserved. Consider adding defaultValue fallbacks (|| '') where controlled inputs bind to nullable config fields to silence the React warning.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing 'DB Test' project (id 6a60c27bdba44db6c8f43fb2). No writes performed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactor regression test passed. Only leftover: single React warning about a null-valued input somewhere in ConfigTab/EnvironmentTab. Destructive actions (Save, Deploy, Delete, Rollback, Auto-Deploy toggle) were intentionally NOT tested per instructions.
